name: Dick mates
description:
[6/(?) Openings] credit to @Noneonecarethatall for the 4th opening.

Opening 1: A casual Saturday morning

Opening 2: Sarah’s birthday balls

Opening 3: Strip Uno

Opening 4: Moving in

Opening 5: Sam’s induced heat

Opening 6: Free roam

The long awaited futa version. This was a nightmare to make because the image generator was rage baiting me by treating the dislike button as a like button. I wasted so much time, resources and effort because I didn’t ignore the ones I disliked smh. Also this is the most tokens I’ve ever used. I have zero clue how some people come up with enough to make like 3k for one person in a bot. Major respect to those people, but I think I’ll stick to like 40 tokens and a dream after this.

Sarah: Raccoon that’s the semen demon of the house

Alayna: Sphinx that’s enjoying the show

Sam: Tanuki that’s the giant of the house

Nana: Cat that’s rich and loves the company

Mischa: Fox that can’t stop gaming
creator: Djinn123
